title: MUSIC VIDEO RENDER B — Eva solo slow-mo wonder at the pink-creature tree
reuseAssetNote: ONE 10s slow-mo render, paired with Suno song 'Pink Tree Whisper.mp3' via loopVideoWithSong.mjs to fill the 60s music block.
prompt: Wide slow-motion music-video shot — soft pastel-pink and lavender gradient backdrop, glowing pollen motes and floating fireflies drifting slowly through the frame. The @pink-creature-tree stands centered in the BACKGROUND — a tall pine trunk with a tall PINK-painted hollow opening in its trunk, the hollow glowing soft pink from inside. NO scene clutter, NO room, NO furniture. @Eva alone in the FOREGROUND-CENTER, arms slowly raised in wonder, head tilted back to look up at the tree, eyes huge and shining. Eva slowly turns in place, her dress and hair drifting in slow-motion as if underwater. Eva extends a single hand slowly toward the pink hollow, palm open in greeting. A single firefly slowly drifts down and lands on her fingertip. Eva smiles softly, eyes huge with awe. The shot is in heavy slow-motion throughout — every gesture takes 2-3x normal time. Movements are LOOPABLE — clean cycle: stand → arms up → turn → reach → firefly lands → smile → return to start. Camera locked, head-on, slow gentle dolly-in. Eva does NOT speak, does NOT sing, does NOT lip-sync — only quiet wonder, occasionally smiling. No audible speech, no music — silent slow-mo render.
